GITHUB SECRETS — Add all 4 to your repo:
Settings → Secrets and variables → Actions → New repository secret

Value:

Value:  zazzystream123

Secret: KEY_ALIAS
Value:  zazzystream

Secret: KEY_PASSWORD

After pushing to main:
→ Actions tab → "Build Release APK" → wait ~5 min
→ Download from Artifacts or Releases tab
